message:
feat: normalize embedding scores in two-tier search refinement

Implement score normalization before blending fast and quality embedding
spaces to avoid scale mismatch. Without normalization, one embedding
space could dominate the final ranking regardless of actual relevance.

Adds normalize_scores() function, ConstantEmbedder test helper, and
test_refinement_scores_are_normalized validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
